name: MONRO, INC.
summary: General We are a leading nation-wide operator of retail tire and automotive repair stores in the United States. We offer to our customers, referred to as guests, replacement tires and tire related services, automotive undercar repair services, and a broad range of routine maintenance services, primarily on passenger cars, light trucks, and vans.
